                                   S. S. ROBISON,

 Santo Domingo, R. D.,
 October 2, 1922.

       MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SAN’I’O ROMINGO.
                    Executive Order No. 808.
                 APPROPRIATION O F FUNDS.

5 I
L     Ey virtue of the powers vested in the Military Governmenk

                                -469-

of Santo Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :

      ARTICLE 1. There is hereby appropriated from fund’s in
t h e National Treasury not otherwise obligated the sum of FIVE
HUNDRED EIGHT DOLLARS THIRTY FOUR CENTS
 ($508.34), t o cover t h e cost of supplies and equipment of t h e
Office of t h e Provost Marshal General.
    ARTICLE 2. This appropri&ion shall be credited with t h e
value o f all articles of eqiuipment returned by t h e office of t h e
Provost Marshal to t h e Dominican Government.

                                        s. s . ROBISON’,
                             Rear Admilral, United States Navy,
                            Military Governor of Slant0 Dolmingo.
